exec_args.query: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';

args.query:
SELECT TRIM(o.OwnerId) as OwnerId, SUM(CAST(oi.Quantity as numeric)*CAST(oi.UnitPrice as numeric)) as sales_total
FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id=oi.OrderId
WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND o.EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25'
GROUP BY TRIM(o.OwnerId)
ORDER BY sales_total DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT TRIM(o.OwnerId) as OwnerId, SUM(CAST(oi.Quantity as numeric)*CAST(oi.UnitPrice as numeric)) as sales_total
FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id=oi.OrderId
WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND o.EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25'
GROUP BY TRIM(o.OwnerId)
ORDER BY sales_total DESC
LIMIT 1;
